visual_description: An older man with light-colored hair, wearing a dark shirt, is seated and has his right shoulder touched by another person’s hand. A young child with short hair, wearing a light-colored shirt, is seated nearby, looking slightly upward and to the side. The background is dimly lit, with a wall displaying several framed photographs and a green cloth hanging on the right side.
audio_description: The audio features a child's voice with a high pitch and moderate speed, accompanied by a gasp and a sigh.
